VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.label: 渊织者
VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.description: Abyssweaver. Twist aberrant flesh, heal through mutation, and tear open rifts for anomaly entities.
VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.tooltip: The forbidden art of the Abyssweaver: rewrite flesh and open rifts to summon anomaly entities.
